title: Non-compliant matching JSON: fanciful name in class field 'Mountain Ice' (low-light, level 9, tilt-left)

form_data.reason: Fanciful or invented designations like 'Mountain Ice' are not approved classes.

image_prompt: Photorealistic clear bottle with a stark white and silver mountain peak label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Summit', 'Mountain Ice', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Summit Distilling, Denver, CO'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo is severe underexposed and noisy. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
